requests.title: Air Conditioner blowing hot air
requests.description: The split AC in room A-101 starts but only blows hot room-temperature air. Looks like the compressor is not turning on.

requests.title: Study table chair leg broken
requests.description: One of the wooden legs of the study table chair is cracked and completely unstable to sit on. Needs immediate replacement or repair.

requests.title: Bathroom shower tap leaking
requests.description: The hot water shower tap in room B-204 bathroom does not close fully and has a continuous steady leak, wasting a lot of water.

requests.title: Wi-Fi connection drops frequently
requests.description: The hostel Wi-Fi router on the 1st floor drops connectivity every few minutes, making it impossible to attend online lectures.

requests.title: Corridor light bulbs flickering
requests.description: The ceiling tube light right outside room A-101 has been flickering constantly. It causes a lot of eye strain at night.

requests.title: Deep clean requested for floor balcony
requests.description: The common balcony area on the second floor has accumulated a lot of dust and fallen leaves over the past week.
